concerns.text: Task T022 implements 'internal coherence' scoring, but the spec (FR-006, US-2) mandates 'BLEU/ROUGE similarity'. The task silently relaxes the functional requirement by substituting a different metric without an explicit spec amendment or traceable override note. This is a semantic weakening of FR-006.

Task T023 handles missing reference text for BLEU/ROUGE, but the plan (Phase 4) declares BLEU/ROUGE 'INVALID' and mandates 'internal coherence'. The task preserves the spec's flawed requirement (FR-006) while ignoring the plan's correction, creating a contradiction where the task attempts to implement a metric the plan explicitly rejects.

Task T022 description includes '(REVISED: NOT BLEU/ROUGE...)' but fails to cite the specific plan section or requirement override that authorizes this deviation from FR-006. Without explicit traceability to the plan's 'Critical Limitation Note', the task appears to be an unauthorized modification of the spec.
